source.name: Destination Lithuanian America (map.truelithuania.com)
source.author: Augustinas Žemaitis
source.note: Sites visited in person; Lithuanian Government Chancellery centenary project. Notes are copyrighted prose — facts extracted, prose not committed; see sourceUrl per entry.
source.reliabilityCaveat: Two truelithuania.com narratives were refuted-as-stated by 2026-07-16 adversarial verification (Aušros Vartų Manhattan; Minersville St. Francis). CANDIDATE scope: validate against the Draugas 1909-2007 registry before any fact reaches the record.
